title: manulea obovata
intro: Manulea obovata is a species of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae, commonly known as broomrape. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various health issues. Manulea obovata has been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and it is also said to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and improve overall health. In herbal preparations, Manulea obovata is often used as a decoction or infusion, and it can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
